name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-assisted presentations that look human-crafted, not machine-generic.
problem: Most AI presentation tools produce visually bland, template-heavy slides that undermine credibility and brand identity. Chronicle 2.0 addresses the gap between speed and quality, letting teams generate polished decks without the tell-tale signs of AI slop. This saves hours of manual design work while maintaining a professional, distinctive aesthetic.
useCases: Creating investor pitch decks that stand out from AI-generated noise
Building client-facing sales presentations with strong visual identity
Producing internal strategy decks quickly without a design team
Developing marketing or product launch presentations at scale
